items.title: Coachella kicks off with Sabrina Carpenter and surprise guests
items.dek: The festival in California was also forced to cancel a set by DJ Anyma on Friday because of strong winds.
items.body: The festival in California was also forced to cancel a set by DJ Anyma on Friday because of strong winds.

items.title: Nearly 400 sentenced in Nigeria for links to militant Islamists
items.dek: Judges handed down sentences ranging from five years to life imprisonment following mass trials.
items.body: Judges handed down sentences ranging from five years to life imprisonment following mass trials.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Irish police push back fuel protesters at oil refinery
items.dek: Demonstrations due to high prices caused by the US-Israeli war against Iran are affecting traffic on several roads.
items.body: Demonstrations due to high prices caused by the US-Israeli war against Iran are affecting traffic on several roads.
